meaning: n.离析器,脱脂器,隔离物,分离者
examples: The separator must be a comma.
By default, the separator is an underscore character.
The first method also takes an argument for the separator string.
Or intense heat could have melted the physical separator between anode and cathode.
When the oil and gas reached the rig, they were diverted not overboard, as might have been wiser, but to a system called the mud-gas separator which spewed gas back onto the rig.
